creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 204929
Add PULSEAUDIO option

Hi!

audio/mumble does not currently offer the possibility to be built against PulseAudio.  The attached patch adds a PULSEAUDIO option (defaulting to off) allowing to build a mumble package with PulseAudio support :-)

No PORTREVISION bump required because the default build is unaffected.

Thanks!
